title: Grevillea dissecta
taxonomy: Grevillea dissecta is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Proteaceae. It belongs to the genus Grevillea, which comprises over 360 species. The genus Grevillea is named after Charles Robert Richmand Greville, an English politician and botany enthusiast. Grevillea dissecta is native to Australia and is often found growing in woodlands and rocky areas. This species is further classified as a member of the Grevillea section, which includes various other species with similar characteristics.
